name_cn:
Authentic Grade
 The "SERPENTI CABOCHON" series mini shoulder bag features a distinctive large-scale graphic pattern and bold metallic texture details, radiating the brilliance of the SERPENTI world with a refined and practical unique design and modern style.
 This handbag is equipped with an adjustable and detachable leather shoulder strap, serving as a handbag or clutch to achieve versatile and matching functions, suitable for both day and night.
 Extra small, with one storage compartment and one card slot. Engraved BVLGARI brand logo on the interior metal plate.
 Model: 291085
 Dimensions: 18 X 12 X 8 cm
